💾 Backup & Restore
Your data is stored only in this browser. Download a backup regularly and keep it safe (phone, Google Drive, USB). You can restore it anytime or move it to another device.
🚗 VIN Search - PartSouq
🚗
Look up a vehicle's parts by VIN
Enter the 17-character Vehicle Identification Number (chassis number) and open PartSouq's parts catalog for that exact vehicle - genuine OEM part numbers, diagrams, and cross-references.

⚙️ API Settings (Optional)
✅ FREE Invoice Scanning

Invoice scanning is powered by Claude AI — reads even handwritten part numbers. Takes 15-30 seconds per invoice.

☁️ Cloud Sync - Firebase (FREE - syncs PC & phone)

Paste your Firebase config here (from console.firebase.google.com → Project settings → Your apps). The whole firebaseConfig = {...} snippet is fine. Leave empty & save to disable.

🤖 Google Gemini AI (FREE - Recommended)

Reads invoice photos & PDFs and auto-updates inventory. Free, no credit card. Get a key from aistudio.google.com → Get API key.

🔍 Google Cloud Vision (Optional - Faster)

Want FASTER extraction (5-15 sec)? Add a Google Cloud Vision API key. Free: 1000 requests/month. Get key from console.cloud.google.com.

🤖 Anthropic API (Optional)

For AI features. Get key from console.anthropic.com.
